note: Every golden/replay hash declares the upstream SEMANTIC SURFACES it depends on and the surface version it was frozen against (bead y4pt). Surfaces declare a version const in source; xtask check-goldens fails when a source const drifts from this registry or a golden's pin drifts from a surface row - an upstream semantic change must point at every downstream golden to re-freeze deliberately, never surprise it. Re-pins follow docs/GOLDEN_POLICY.md (committed tree, BOTH debug and release, plausible root cause).

goldens.justification: 0xeef1_0550_7daf_c0d5 frozen 2026-07-09 after the powi build-mode fix (bead 4xnt); verified four quadrants (debug+release x aarch64+x86-64) at the committed tree. HISTORY: the 2026-07-09 re-pin to f3dcb63b wrongly blamed fs-rand d9ba0b6 (u64::MAX-boundary-only change) - the mover was optimization-dependent f64::powi in the fixture; that incident motivated this registry.

0x1d7a_a3c6_b631_7ef0 recorded at 6ys.3 landing, M4 Pro + trj; tier-invariant across the xdgf NEON capsule (bitwise-equal microkernel, verified). KC is part of the bit contract - retuning KC bumps fs-la:gemm-bits and re-freezes this.

0x9b2d_3f23_3704_8523 frozen 2026-07-10 (bead 6nb.9): content hash of the powi-incident-model regression family; integer/to_bits arithmetic only, so identical across build modes and ISAs by construction.

0x0377_a8c9_5992_aee9 originally frozen at 6ys.4 and registered 2026-07-10 for bug bead 9ry9. The semantic surface includes fixed per-element reduction order, beta-zero overwrite, alpha-zero no-read behavior, and batch-membership invariance; the frozen fixture uses nonzero alpha and remained unchanged in debug and release.

0x5600_7cfe_6a6d_1f9a rechecked unchanged 2026-07-10 for bug bead 9ry9: semantics v2 makes the already-promised alpha-zero path scale or overwrite C without reading poisoned A/B; the frozen fixture uses nonzero alpha, so its bits remain unchanged. The f32 and mixed chains retain the narrow-once contract; cross-ISA empirical proof remains pending the next x86 lane.

0x22dd_b617_266e_a792 (n=128, stage walk) frozen at the radix-8/4/2 bump (bead 27d3), verified four quadrants (M4 + ts2 x debug + release). UNTOUCHED by the six-step slice: dispatch is a pure function of n (asserted in-suite) and n=128 stays on the stage path. HISTORY: radix-2 0xbd55_68d2_33f4_b4bc; radix-4/2 0x0506_a4a0_955d_cf8e.

0x79aa_108f_a517_012f frozen 2026-07-10 (bead 27d3 six-step slice): n=2^16 through the cache-blocked six-step (3 out-of-place tiled transposes + 2 cache-resident row sweeps with fused w^(kj) twiddle), gated behind frontier-sixstep (measured slower than the stage walk on M4 - ships OFF until the SIMD-tile transpose capsule). New bit territory, not a bump. FOUR QUADRANTS verified: aarch64 (M4) and x86-64 (ts2) in debug and release each (ts2:/data/tmp/fsim_xisa/sixstep_rel.log).

0x4e42_4a53_6a63_ce8b re-frozen 2026-07-10 at xo2k CLOSE: root cause of the ~31-ulp poured_mass release-vs-debug divergence was platform sin/cos in the pour tilt schedule (release const-folds libm with inlined literal rig params); routed through fs_math::det::sin/cos, poured_mass is mode-invariant (0x3fd3b2951fb7df34 both modes) and RESTORED to the hashed stream (6 metrics again); fs-lbm rheology powf paths migrated to det::pow in the same change (latent, same class). FOUR QUADRANTS verified 2026-07-10: hash reproduces on aarch64 (M4) and x86-64 (ts2) in debug and release each (6ure verification run, ts2:/data/tmp/fsim_xisa/run_{debug,release}.log). HISTORY: 5-metric envelope interim 0xfb33_2a50_af26_1116; divergent 6-metric v2 0xdabd_6fd3_6315_31fe; v1 0xd70b_9ac9_0828_ae86.

0xae56_945a_312e_0378 re-frozen 2026-07-10 at 6ure CLOSE: the ~1e-9 aarch64-vs-x86-64 roa divergence was platform libm (macOS vs glibc) in the fs-bem panel kernel feeding the ROA adjoint lift slope; the whole fs-bem surface (panel2d influence atan2/ln, cosine spacing, freestream trig, wake2d, panel3d probe) now routes through fs_math::det:: (surface fs-bem:panel-bits=1), so bits legitimately moved on every platform and roa (0x3fe4c1ee0bb8f1e8, identical debug+release on aarch64) is RESTORED to the hashed stream (6 metrics). Cross-ISA reproduction on ts2 recorded in the 6ure close comment. HISTORY: 5-metric envelope interim 0x1b03_ae9f_66cd_b548; divergent 6-metric v2 0xd750_e1bb_a8d7_e76a; v1 0xf513_eaf8_22d2_7813.

0x9c09_b06a_7883_57fc re-frozen 2026-07-10 for the gp3.14 metric-stream encoding migration v1->v2 (canonical typed length-prefixed replay identity); every metric bit pattern in the stage evidence is unchanged from the v1 freeze, verified in the battery output; debug+release both green at the committed tree.
